title: Accordion
description:
Build an **Accordion** component that displays a list of collapsible sections.

### Requirements

- Render a header button for each item in the `items` array
- All sections start **collapsed** (panel content is not in the DOM)
- Clicking a header **expands** that section, revealing its content
- Clicking the same header again **collapses** it
- Only **one section** can be open at a time — opening a new one closes the previous
- Each header must have `aria-expanded` set to `"true"` when open, `"false"` when closed
- When open, apply the CSS class `accordion__header--open` to the header button

### Test IDs

| Element | data-testid |
|---------|-------------|
| Section header | `header-{item.id}` |
| Section panel | `panel-{item.id}` |
constraints:
- Use React functional components with hooks
- Do not use any external UI libraries
- Panels must be conditionally rendered, not just hidden with CSS
hints: Use useState to track the id of the currently open section (or null if none are open).
Clicking the same header that's already open should set the state to null.
Only render the panel div when its section is the active one.
